title: 'Sick Mindset', 'Disgusting': Outrage Mounts After MP Pappu Yadav’s '90% Women' Remark Triggers National Row
description: MP Pappu Yadav faced huge backlash over his claim that majority of women in Indian politics cannot succeed without spending time in the bedroom of a male politician. Priyanka Chaturvedi labeled his comments as "shameless" and "filthy." NCW Chief termed the remark "highly objectionable & insensitive"
